tldr_zh: OpenAI 推 1.5 億美元夥伴網絡，Anthropic 遭美國禁用新模型，伊朗美國達成和平協議
tldr_en: OpenAI launches $150M Partner Network; Anthropic models banned by US; Iran-US peace deal reached

items.title_zh: OpenAI 投資 1.5 億美元推出夥伴網絡計劃
items.title_en: OpenAI Launches $150M Partner Network for Enterprise AI
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 正式推出夥伴網絡計劃，投資 1.5 億美元助力全球企業加速採納、部署和轉型人工智能。該計劃旨在幫助企業更快地實現 AI 變革，標誌著 OpenAI 進一步深化與產業合作的戰略。
items.summary_en: OpenAI launches the Partner Network with $150M investment to help global enterprises accelerate AI adoption, deployment, and transformation. This initiative strengthens OpenAI's commitment to supporting enterprise-level AI implementation across industries.

items.title_zh: 美國禁止 Anthropic 新模型出口 中國疑似入侵事件引發
items.title_en: US Restricts Anthropic Model Exports Over China Access Fears
items.summary_zh: 白宮對 Anthropic 的 Mythos 和 Fable 模型實施出口限制，擔憂中國相關組織可能已獲得這些模型訪問權限。同時亞馬遜的網路安全研究也推動了這一決策，凸顯 AI 模型的國家安全敏感性。
items.summary_en: The White House imposed export restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos and Fable 5 models due to concerns about potential access by China-linked groups. Amazon's cybersecurity research also contributed to the decision, highlighting national security implications for advanced AI models.

items.title_zh: FBI 在阿拉巴馬州建造虛擬城鎮訓練網路防禦
items.title_en: FBI Opens Cyber Range Simulating Entire Town for Training
items.summary_zh: 美國 FBI 在亨茨維爾開設佔地 22,000 平方英尺的網路靶場，完整複製一座小鎮的環境包括便利店、加油站和醫院。此設施用於培訓網路安全人員應對現實複雜的數位攻擊情景。
items.summary_en: The FBI opened a 22,000 square-foot Cyber Range in Huntsville, Alabama, featuring a complete replica town with convenience stores, gas stations, and hospitals. This facility trains cybersecurity personnel in realistic digital attack scenarios.

items.title_zh: Meta 被迫解除 20 億美元 Manus 收購 應北京要求
items.title_en: Meta Unwinds $2B Manus Acquisition Following Beijing Demand
items.summary_zh: Meta 開始逆轉 20 億美元的 Manus 收購交易，此舉源於中國政府的強制要求。該事件反映中國對外資科技收購的嚴格管控政策，影響全球科技併購生態。
items.summary_en: Meta begins dismantling its $2 billion Manus acquisition after Beijing ordered the deal reversal. The incident reflects China's strict control over foreign tech acquisitions and impacts the global M&A landscape.

items.title_zh: 英國擬禁止 16 歲以下兒童使用社群媒體
items.title_en: UK Considers Ban on Social Media for Under-16s
items.summary_zh: 英國政府可能效仿澳洲的做法，禁止 16 歲以下兒童使用主要社群媒體平台。此舉旨在保護未成年人線上安全，繼續全球兒童網路保護浪潮。
items.summary_en: The UK is considering legislation to ban social media platforms for children under 16, following Australia's lead. The measure aims to protect minors online and represents continuing global efforts in youth digital safety.

items.title_zh: KPMG 因 AI 幻覺問題撤回 AI 使用調查報告
items.title_en: KPMG Withdraws AI Report Due to Hallucinations
items.summary_zh: KPMG 撤回一份關於 AI 使用情況的報告，原因是報告中出現了明顯的 AI 幻覺和事實錯誤。此事例突顯了當前 AI 系統在生成可靠信息方面仍存在的核心問題。
items.summary_en: KPMG withdrew its AI usage report after discovering apparent hallucinations and factual errors. The incident highlights persistent reliability issues with AI systems in generating accurate information.

items.title_zh: 印度在 Anthropic 事件後重審 AI 發展戰略
items.title_en: India Reassesses AI Strategy After Anthropic Model Ban
items.summary_zh: 隨著 Anthropic 暫停新模型訪問，印度科技領袖開始辯論該事件對國家 AI 野心的警示意義。此事引發印度對建立獨立 AI 能力重要性的深思。
items.summary_en: Indian tech leaders debate whether the Anthropic model suspension serves as a wake-up call for India's AI ambitions. The incident prompts discussion about developing independent AI capabilities.

items.title_zh: 伊朗與美國達成和平協議 霍爾木茲海峽恢復開放
items.title_en: Iran and US Reach Peace Deal; Hormuz Strait to Reopen
items.summary_zh: 美國總統川普宣布與伊朗達成和平協議已完成，荷莫茲海峽將重新開放，美國解除海上封鎖。簽署儀式將於 6 月 19 日在日內瓦舉行，該協議終結三個月來的海峽封鎖危機。
items.summary_en: President Trump announced completion of a peace deal with Iran, with the Hormuz Strait reopening and US maritime blockade lifting. The signing ceremony is scheduled for June 19 in Geneva, ending a three-month strait closure crisis.

items.title_zh: 瑞士公投否決人口上限提案 優先經濟穩定
items.title_en: Swiss Voters Reject Population Cap Proposal
items.summary_zh: 瑞士選民以近 55% 的票數否決了將人口上限設為 1000 萬的提案，優先考慮經濟穩定和與歐盟的關係，超越對移民潮加重公共服務負擔的疑慮。
items.summary_en: Swiss voters rejected a population cap proposal with nearly 55% voting against it, prioritizing economic stability and EU relations over concerns about immigration straining public services.

items.title_zh: 巴西直升機相撞事故 美歌手奧利佛樹罹難
items.title_en: Helicopter Collision in Brazil Kills US Singer Oliver Tree
items.summary_zh: 兩架直升機在巴西里約熱內盧空中相撞後墜毀，6 人遇難，其中包括進行世界巡演的美國創作歌手奧利佛樹。該事故仍在調查中，當地警方已介入。
items.summary_en: Two helicopters collided in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, resulting in 6 deaths including American singer Oliver Tree who was performing his world tour. The incident is under investigation.

items.title_zh: 英國扣押疑似俄羅斯影子艦隊油輪
items.title_en: UK Detains Suspected Russian Shadow Fleet Tanker
items.summary_zh: 英國皇家海軍在英吉利海峽查扣一艘涉及俄羅斯影子艦隊的被制裁油輪。此舉是英國對俄羅斯能源走私的強硬立場，與伊朗協議簽訂形成對比。
items.summary_en: The UK Royal Navy detained a sanctioned tanker believed linked to Russia's shadow fleet in the English Channel. The action reflects Britain's tough stance against Russian energy smuggling.

items.title_zh: 加薩死亡人數超過 7.3 萬 以色列繼續軍事行動
items.title_en: Gaza Death Toll Exceeds 73,000 Amid Ongoing Israeli Strikes
items.summary_zh: 巴勒斯坦官員稱加薩死亡人數已超過 7.3 萬，儘管正在進行停火協議，以色列仍繼續對加薩實施轟炸。衝突持續造成大量人道主義危機。
items.summary_en: Palestinian officials report Gaza death toll exceeds 73,000 as Israel continues military strikes despite ceasefire agreements. The ongoing conflict continues causing severe humanitarian crisis.
